title: Children's Hospital 2 — Pediatrics Department
excerpt: My clinical rotation at Children's Hospital 2, one of the largest pediatric hospitals in Ho Chi Minh City, where I gained hands-on experience in diagnosing and managing common pediatric conditions.

title: Thong Nhat Hospital — Infectious Diseases Department
excerpt: My rotation at Thong Nhat Hospital's Infectious Diseases Department, where I gained experience in diagnosing and managing a wide spectrum of infectious diseases prevalent in Southern Vietnam.
